ranking_rationale: cosh=hyperbolic trig in same worktree with SFPU_THREE_PARAM_KERNEL_FP32_FIRST and custom include macro; cbrt=same worktree custom ckernel using is_fp32_dest_acc_en+ITERATIONS template params in LLK layer; selu=same worktree with complete end-to-end registration in unary_op_utils.cpp get_macro_definition() and SFPU_OP_SELU_INCLUDE; asinh=mathematical cousin in ckernel_sfpu_trigonometry.h using _calculate_log_body_no_init_ same internal helper; acosh=inverse hyperbolic family same _init_inverse_hyperbolic_ init different from atanh init showing the distinction needed
